name: dTTT + BigramHash 3072x112 + GPTQ int6
blurb: Discriminative pre-quant AdamW TTT (per-block LR 0.3x-1.0x, freeze=0, 10 epochs) on BigramHash 3072x112 base. Builds directly on PR #1351 dTTT framework; only change is scaling BigramHash from 2048x128 to 3072x112 following PR #1019/1405 best practices. 3-seed mean 1.0800 (std 0.0002). All artifacts under 16MB, all training under 600s.
author: Aamod Bhatt
